title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to Salesforce deployments and data management. OpsPal now better handles State/Country picklists and complex deployment workflows, reducing setup errors and deployment failures. Several behind-the-scenes fixes ensure more reliable platform performance across all integrations.

entries.headline: Better Salesforce State/Country picklist handling and deployment reliability
details: OpsPal now automatically detects State/Country picklist configurations that could cause deployment issues
Deployment workflows are more reliable with improved validation and retry capabilities
